description: Verifies a customer's identity using their Mobile Number and National ID (NIC). Use this before performing sensitive actions or accessing private account details.

national_id.description: The user's National Identity Card (NIC) number.

description: Retrieves the customer's data balance, voice balance, account status, and billing type using their mobile number. Use this when a user asks about their remaining data, minutes, or account status.

mobile_number.description: The 10-digit mobile number. ASK the user directly if missing.
